---
title: "Biomarker Differential Expression"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Biomarker Differential Expression}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse = TRUE, comment = "#>")
library(ggpower)
```

Two-group mean difference for expression biomarkers (wrapper around `t_two_sample`).

## Formula

$$d = \frac{\mu_1 - \mu_2}{\sigma}, \quad \delta = d\sqrt{\frac{n_1 n_2}{n_1+n_2}}$$

## Post hoc power

```{r example}
power_compute("ttest_biomarker", "post_hoc", d = 0.6, n1 = 40, n2 = 40,
              alpha = 0.05, tails = "two")
```

## A priori sample size

```{r apriori}
power_compute("ttest_biomarker", "a_priori", d = 0.5, alpha = 0.05,
              power = 0.8, allocation_ratio = 1)
```

## Related

- [t Tests](t-tests.html)
- [Multiplicity and FDR](biomarker-multiplicity-fdr.html)
